system.description:
This portly curmudgeon does a brisk trade in real estate titles, both lending and foreclosing. He is acutely aware of the value of properties and how neighbors affect value. He takes particular glee in foreclosing on aristocracy and setting up the newly rich in ancient estates.

Sometimes he hires outsiders to solve problems that his hired bluecoats and bribed councilmen cannot manage. He collects sculpture by Duskvol artists. He has ruined the lives of many formerly influential people.
